overview.description: The PIMCO US Stocks PLUS Active Bond Exchange-Traded Fund (SPLS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed ETF that invests in large-cap US companies while using risk-based analysis to invest indirectly through derivatives on actively managed fixed income ETFs. SPLS was launched on Jan 15, 2026 and is issued by PIMCO.

data.title: PIMCO launches new active fixed income ETF
data.text: Jerome Schneider, PIMCO short-term portfolio management head, sits down with CNBC's Dom Chu to discuss the firm's newest active ETF and how it combines passive investing with actively managed assets.

data.title: PIMCO Launches New Active ETF
data.text: NEWPORT BEACH, Calif., Jan. 16, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- PIMCO, a global leader in active fixed income with deep expertise across public and private markets, is expanding its exchange-traded fund offe...
